# Baltimore Aircoil (BAC) — Heat Rejection for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## TrilliumSeries Adiabatic Cooler — THE PICK FOR LOUISIANA
- 44% peak energy reduction vs pure air-cooled
- 90% less water than cooling towers
- Epoxy-coated fins for humidity/salt (Gulf Coast)
- Runs dry in mild weather, adds water only on hot days
- Pure dry coolers derate badly above 95F — adiabatic is the answer

## TrilliumSeries Dry Cooler
- Up to 10,000 MBH (~2,930 kW)
- Vertical copper coil
- Independent fans with VFDs
- Whisper Quiet option (-13 dB)
- Launched June 2025

## Why Adiabatic for Louisiana
- Summer peaks 92-100F ambient
- Pure dry coolers can't reject enough heat above 95F
- Adiabatic assist kicks in only when needed
- Most of the year runs in dry mode (zero water)

## AMERICAN MADE — Jessup, Maryland
